expected_behavior: Agent dispatches to the Ingest workflow for the provided source path
Agent preserves the source as raw evidence instead of paraphrasing it away

For a source over 50 MB or an impractical binary, agent records a provenance-rich pointer or stub with checksum, size, original location, and import notes instead of pretending the binary was vendored into git
Agent updates indexes and provenance stubs around the ingest plan rather than skipping large-source traceability
